items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Inflation could top 4% this week. The bond market wants Fed Chair Warsh to prove he’ll fight it.
items.summary: Investors are growing impatient with inflation that looks unlikely to be tamed on its own.
items.text_it: L'inflazione potrebbe superare il 4% questa settimana. Il mercato obbligazionario vuole che la Fed Chair Warsh dimostri che lo combatterà.
items.summary_it: Gli investitori sono sempre più impazienti con l'inflazione che sembra improbabile che possa essere domata da sola.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: BofA sees ‘red flags’ in the U.S. stock market. Here’s what to buy now.
items.summary: Most investors who pile into the S&P 500 in 2026 think they own the entire stock market. What they actually own is nothing more than a heavy bet on Big Tech — and right now, that bet has run its course.
